title: MCP Streaming and Progress
description: Schemas for progress notifications, streaming partial results, and checkpoint-based resumption.

ProgressNotification.title: Progress Notification
ProgressNotification.description: Sent by the server during long-running operations to communicate progress.

operation_id.description: Unique identifier for the operation, matching the original request.

progress.description: Completion fraction (0.0 to 1.0). Omit if progress is indeterminate.

estimated_remaining_seconds.description: Estimated time to completion. Omit if unknown.

partial_result.description: Optional intermediate result. The client can begin presenting this data before the operation completes.

checkpoint_token.description: Opaque token that can be passed to resume this operation if interrupted.

StreamChunk.title: Stream Chunk
StreamChunk.description: A single chunk in a streaming response.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for ordering.

data.description: The chunk payload. Schema depends on the tool.

is_final.description: Whether this is the last chunk in the stream.

checkpoint_token.description: Resume token valid after this chunk.

ResumeRequest.title: Resume Request
ResumeRequest.description: Resume an interrupted operation from a checkpoint.

checkpoint_token.description: Token received from the last progress notification or stream chunk before interruption.
